title: Geepas 3-in-1 Egg Boiler Poacher, 350W | Electric Egg Cooker & Omelette Maker, Vegetable Steamer | Poaching Bowl, Measuring Cup with Egg Piercer | Up to 7 Egg Capacity, Soft Medium & Hard-Boiled Eggs
seller_info_text: Dispatched from and sold by Koksi Corp..
features: QUICK, HEALTHY AND HASSLE FREE – The Geepas Egg Boiler maintains all the egg nutrients and keeps all the deliciousness and taste preserved. It saves you the trouble for having to look after the eggs. Get freshly cooked eggs for your breakfast with ease. It is also great for steamed foods. Use the poaching bowl to steam foods such as beans, baby corn, asparagus and other veg. It could also take small portions of meat and fish like salmon.

COOKS 7 EGGS AT ONCE, STAINLESS STEEL LID – This boiler tray has a capacity of holding 7 eggs. It cooks soft, medium or hard eggs just change the water volume and let the egg cooker do the rest. Create perfect boiled eggs, omelettes or poached eggs and even steam your favourite vegetables with this Egg Boiler.

INCLUDES AN EGG PIERCER BUILT ONTO THE MEASUING CUP – Never lose your egg piercer again as this egg piercer is built onto the measuring cup. Eggs should be pierced on the larger side to keep the shell from cracking during boiling. Do not pierce the small side, nor pierce both sides of the egg; only one side for the best results in boiled eggs. Measuring cup provided has marking guidelines for the quantity of water to be used for cooking eggs according to your preference- soft, medium or hard.

AUTOMATIC BUZZER, POWER LIGHT, SWITCH CONTROL (STOP & HEAT)– Comes equipped with all the important features for your safety. The beeping alarm function will notify you when the eggs are ready, so you can consume the eggs when they are just off the boil; all fresh and deliciously hot. A simple red light has been built into the unit so you always know when the unit is powered on and off saving you electricity. PERFECT AID FOR A NUTRITIOUS BREAKFAST.
